name: AGV Payload Stability Study
description: As a robotics engineer, write a Python program using the ZMQ Remote API to determine the maximum safe acceleration for an Automated Guided Vehicle (AGV) carrying a tall, heavy payload (0.5m x 0.5m x 1.5m) on a kinematic platform. Identify the tipping threshold (defined as tilt exceeding 30 degrees) by testing at least 8 linear accelerations from 1.0 m/s^2 to 6.0 m/s^2 along the X-axis for up to 3 simulated seconds per trial. Export the results to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/stability_trials.csv (columns: trial_id, acceleration_m_s2, tipped, max_tilt_deg, survival_time_s) and /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/stability_report.json (fields: total_trials, max_safe_acceleration_m_s2, min_tipping_acceleration_m_s2, payload_height_m, payload_width_m). Login: username=ga, password=password123.
